name: Beer Battered Shrimp with Chipotle Dipping Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon chipotle pepper, in adobo sauce
1 pound (21 to 25 pieces) shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oil to 365 degrees.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together all the dipping sauce ingredients.
3. Transfer to a serving bowl, cover, and set aside.
4. In a medium size bowl, combine all the dry ingredients for the batter.
5. Slowly whisk in beer until combined. If not using right away, cover and refrigerate for later use.
6. Gently toss shrimp in the batter to coat.
7. Shake gently to remove excess batter.
8. Carefully fry in hot oil for 5 to 6 minutes or until golden brown. Cook in batches to avoid overcrowding.
9. Remove shrimp with a spider or slotted spoon and place on paper towels to drain.
10. Serve hot with dipping sauce.
Yield: 4 servings
